adaptive_card.default.title: Jutapta
adaptive_card.qa.title: Adaptive Card wakichañanaka
qa.default.description: Aka hatuax kunjams aka Adaptive Card ukax cargasi ukat jaqukipasi uk wakichañataki.
qa.default.title: Adaptive Card wakichäwi qallta
qa.question.card_input.help: Uñstayiri asset ukhamächi ukhaxa: pack ukar uñtasita JSON archivo thaki qillqt'ma (sañäni: assets/cards/welcome.json). Uñstayiri inline ukhamächi ukhaxa: taqpacha Adaptive Card JSON lip'katma.
qa.question.card_input.label: Card mantaña
qa.question.card_source.help: Ajlliñamawa tarjeta q'ipin mä JSON archivo taypit apnaqañataki, mä jaya tarjeta q'ipiru apaniñataki, jan ukax crudo inline tarjeta JSON lip'iqañataki.
qa.question.card_source.label: ¿Kunjamatsa tarjetas ukanakax qalltatpach cargasiñapa?
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.help: Mä distribuiñjam tarjeta catálogo referencia qillqt'aña, akhamjama: store://greentic-biz/_/adaptive-cards/default jan ukax repo://my-repo/cards/catalog.json.
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.label: Tarjeta catálogo referencia
qa.question.confirm_remove.help: Yes ajlliñamawa aka componente wakichäwi q'ala apsuñataki.
qa.question.confirm_remove.label: ¿Aka Adaptive Card wakichäwi apsuña munta?
qa.question.default_card_asset.help: Tarjeta asset thakhi jan ukax referencia qillqt'aña. Yant'awi: assets/cards/welcome.json jan ukax repo://my-repo/cards/welcome.json
qa.question.default_card_asset.label: Tarjeta asset thakhi/referencia qallta
qa.question.default_card_inline.help: Adaptive Card JSON qallta lip'kataña, ukax apnaqasiñapawa kunapachatix janiw invocation override utjkiti.
qa.question.default_card_inline.label: Adaptive Card JSON qallta lip'kataña
qa.question.default_card_remote.help: Mä jaya tarjeta uñt'äwi mantañamawa apaniñataki, sañäni https://..., oci://..., store://..., jan ukax repo://.... Greentic Flow ukax mä local assets/cards/*.json thakiruw askichañapa apply_answers returns janïra kutt'aykasin.
qa.question.default_card_remote.label: Jaya tarjeta uñt'äwi
qa.question.direction_mode.help: Ajlliñamawa kunjams tarjeta saphi text direction uk utt'ayañapa.
qa.question.direction_mode.label: Qillqañ sarawi
qa.question.direction_mode.option.ltr: Sapa kuti ch'iqa tuqit kupi tuqiru
qa.question.direction_mode.option.rtl: Sapa kuti kupi tuqit ch'iqa tuqiru
qa.question.language_mode.help: Ajlliñamawa taqpach built-in locale jan ukax mä custom locale lista yanapt'añataki.
qa.question.language_mode.label: ¿Kuna arunaksa yanapt'añ munta?
qa.question.multilingual.help: Inglés arux utjaskakiwa fallback básico ukhama, walja arunak yanapt'ayañ yant'kta ukhasa.
qa.question.multilingual.label: ¿Walja arunak yanapt'añ munta?
qa.question.supported_locales.help: Comasamp jaljata locale códigos lista mantañamawa. Yant'äwi: en,fr,de
qa.question.supported_locales.label: Locale códigos qillqt'aña
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.help: Nayrar sartayata ukhaxa, traces ukanakax payload, session, state, ukat interaction inputs ukanakampïspawa.
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.label: Qhananchäwinakan mantañanak impantaña
qa.question.trace_enabled.help: Adaptive Card trace telemetry apsuña, asset askichañataki, bindings ukat estado lurawinakataki.
qa.question.trace_enabled.label: Qhananchawi ch'amanchaña
qa.question.update_area.help: Kawkir chiqa componente wakichäwita machaqaptayañ munta uk ajlliña.
qa.question.update_area.label: ¿Kuna machaqaptayañ munta?
qa.question.validation_mode.help: Kunjam ch'amañampi invocation schema pantjatanak apnaqañasa uk ajlliña.
qa.question.validation_mode.label: Jani walt'äwi chiqanchawi moda
qa.remove.description: Aka componente wakichäwi apsuña jan ukax mayampi qalltaña.
qa.remove.title: Adaptive Card wakichäwi apsuña
qa.setup.description: Tarjeta qallta wakichäwinaka, walja aru sarnaqawi, sarawi, jani walt'äwi chiqanchawi ukat qhananchawi wakichaña.
qa.setup.title: Adaptive Card wakichaña
qa.update.description: Adaptive Card wakichäwina mä chiqa sapa kuti machaqaptayaña.
qa.update.title: Adaptive Card machaqaptayaña
validation.card.invalid-card: Action.ShowCard card ukax mä object ukhamäñapawa
validation.card.invalid-choice: Choices ukax jan ch'usa p'iqinchäwi ukat valor ukanakaniñapawa
validation.card.invalid-choices: Input.ChoiceSet choices ukax mä array ukhamäñapawa
validation.card.invalid-columns: ColumnSet columnas ukax mä array ukhamäñapawa
validation.card.invalid-data: Action.Execute data ukax utjki ukhax mä object ukhamäñapawa
validation.card.invalid-root: Card ukax mä JSON object ukhamäñapawa
validation.card.invalid-source: Media sources ukax jan ch'usa url ukanimpiñapawa
validation.card.invalid-sources: Media sources ukax mä array ukhamäñapawa
validation.invocation.invalid_enum: Invocation campo ukax jan yanapt'at enum valor ukaniwa
validation.invocation.invalid_type: Invocation campo ukax jan wali tipo ukaniwa
validation.invocation.missing_field: Invocation ukax mä wakiskir campo ukat pist'atawa
